---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "I need to validate tokens against a custom claim, but there's no hook for it."

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Include API examples if possible:

```typescript
// Example usage
@CustomDecorator('value')
```

## Alternatives considered

List any workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or links to relevant Keycloak documentation.
